title: Spatial Transcriptomics of Human Carotid Plaques
excerpt: Jessica Pauli shared new work exploring the molecular landscape of human carotid artery plaques through bulk and single-cell RNA sequencing paired with single-cell spatial transcriptomics. The study highlights distinct plaque morphologies linked to specific cellular compositions, identifies an inflammatory smooth muscle cell subtype, maps neovascularization regions and macrophage hotspots, and shows local transdifferentiation of inflammatory HMOX1-positive macrophages into TREM2-positive lipid-handling phenotypes within plaque border zones. Michael Menden is listed among the contributing authors.
